ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography provides a styled blockquote example.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves figure, blockquote, figcaption, cite, and optional source-link semantics so attribution and provenance remain structured rather than decorative text.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal white workbench surfaces, precise Ink boundaries or rules, strong type hierarchy, restrained Living Green and Violet evidence cues, purposeful preference-safe motion, and shared radii no greater than 16 CSS pixels.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora preserves figure, blockquote, figcaption, cite, and optional source-link semantics so attribution and provenance remain structured rather than decorative text.

api.enableWhen: Supply attribution and/or sourceTitle, with citeUrl when a source link is appropriate.

disabledBehavior.ui: No caption, attribution, source title, or source link is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The quotation remains ordinary block content.
disabledBehavior.events: No source-link navigation target or event path exists.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No attribution or source context is added to the reading order.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated semantic, keyboard, focus, axe, 320 CSS-pixel, touch, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion evidence is current; contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, and switch records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Semantic quote and optional citation anatomy, link focus, wrapping, RTL, forced colors, and narrow presentation are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and applicable touch evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography provides inline code styling.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora can isolate machine text bidirectionally so code tokens remain readable inside opposite-direction prose without forcing isolation on ordinary inline code.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal white workbench surfaces, precise Ink boundaries or rules, strong type hierarchy, restrained Living Green and Violet evidence cues, purposeful preference-safe motion, and shared radii no greater than 16 CSS pixels.

disabledBehavior.ui: No bidi-isolation data state is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Inline code follows the surrounding Unicode bidirectional context.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No direction-isolation attribute or extra accessible output is added.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography styles code, while labelled blocks, line evidence, clipboard recovery, and status announcements require composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora provides labelled code, optional line evidence, exact copy state with failure recovery, line numbering, and overflow that remains keyboard and touch reachable.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal white workbench surfaces, precise Ink boundaries or rules, strong type hierarchy, restrained Living Green and Violet evidence cues, purposeful preference-safe motion, and shared radii no greater than 16 CSS pixels.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora provides labelled code, optional line evidence, exact copy state with failure recovery, line numbering, and overflow that remains keyboard and touch reachable.

disabledBehavior.ui: The copy action and copy-status rail are not rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The component performs no clipboard write or copy-state transition.
disabledBehavior.events: No copy handler, clipboard request, or copy callback path is installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No copy button, live region, copied status, or failure status is exposed.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography documents common text elements but does not ship a description-list component with responsive semantic layouts.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora retains native dl, dt, and dd ownership while offering density and a responsive columns-to-stack layout that never turns terms into presentational grid labels.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal white workbench surfaces, precise Ink boundaries or rules, strong type hierarchy, restrained Living Green and Violet evidence cues, purposeful preference-safe motion, and shared radii no greater than 16 CSS pixels.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora retains native dl, dt, and dd ownership while offering density and a responsive columns-to-stack layout that never turns terms into presentational grid labels.

api.enableWhen: Choose columns or responsive instead of stacked.

disabledBehavior.ui: Stacked mode removes the column layout and presents each term directly above its details.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No responsive column transition is applied.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: Native dl, dt, and dd semantics remain with no layout-generated accessible output.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography provides separately styled heading examples.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps the native h1 through h6 level explicit while allowing an independently chosen visual scale, preventing visual size from silently rewriting document structure.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora keeps the native h1 through h6 level explicit while allowing an independently chosen visual scale, preventing visual size from silently rewriting document structure.

api.enableWhen: Supply size when visual emphasis should differ from the semantic heading level.

disabledBehavior.ui: Visual size derives predictably from the semantic heading element.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No independent visual-scale override is applied.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: The native heading level remains unchanged and no extra accessible output is added.

disabledBehavior.ui: The visible active-path rail is not rendered.

disabledBehavior.events: No path-display update is emitted beyond existing controlled active-path behavior.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: The active path is not added as contextual reading-order text.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Typography provides styled text examples and leaves recoverable truncation to the consumer.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora can truncate visually while retaining the complete value for keyboard focus, touch, title, copy, and assistive-technology recovery.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal white workbench surfaces, precise Ink boundaries or rules, strong type hierarchy, restrained Living Green and Violet evidence cues, purposeful preference-safe motion, and shared radii no greater than 16 CSS pixels.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora can truncate visually while retaining the complete value for keyboard focus, touch, title, copy, and assistive-technology recovery.

api.enableWhen: Set truncate true and provide fullValue when children are not plain text.

disabledBehavior.ui: Text is not clipped and no truncation affordance is shown.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The full inline value renders naturally without reveal behavior.
disabledBehavior.events: No truncation-specific focus, hover, touch, or copy path is installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No full-value aria-label or truncation recovery metadata is emitted.
